title: Linting for Correctness, Safety, and Maintainability · Repository Factory
summary: Configure a high-signal linter beyond default style warnings. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a risk-based lint policy and fixtures while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.
Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
